payload.last_assistant_message: Perfect! Now I have gathered comprehensive information. Let me compile the final report. ## Summary of Files Related to Photoshop Plans Page Based on my thorough search of the codebase, here are all relevant files related to the Photoshop Plans page with CTA-related elements: ### Core Web Components (Main Implementation Files) 1. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/src/variants/plans.js`** - Main Plans variant component implementation - Contains `PLANS_AEM_FRAGMENT_MAPPING` configuration that maps CTAs to the footer slot - Handles slot placement and responsive adjustments for plans cards - Implements layout logic for plan cards in collections 2. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/src/variants/plans.css.js`** - CSS styling for the Plans variant component - Styles for plan card layout, spacing, and visual hierarchy 3. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/src/variants/plans-v2.js`** - Updated Plans variant (v2) implementation - Alternative or evolved version of plans component 4. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/src/variants/plans-v2.css.js`** - CSS styling for Plans v2 variant 5. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/src/hydrate.js`** - Core hydration logic that processes CTA elements (lines 683-698) - `processCTAs()` function handles CTA transformation from links to buttons - `transformLinkToButton()` function converts checkout links to buttons - Handles analytics for CTA elements ### Promoted Plans Variant 6. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/src/variants/ah-promoted-plans.js`** - Alternative promoted plans variant with separate CTA handling 7. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/src/variants/ah-promoted-plans.css.js`** - Styling for promoted plans variant ### Test Fixtures & Mock Data 8. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/test/mocks/sites/fragments/fragment-photoshop.json`** - Mock AEM fragment for Photoshop CCD card - Contains CTA with "Buy now" text and checkout-link element - Shows CTA structure: `Buy now` 9. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/test/mocks/sites/fragments/fragment-photography-plans.json`** - Mock AEM fragment for Photography Plans card - Contains "Buy now" CTA in checkout-link format 10. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/test/mocks/sites/fragments/fragment-individual-plans-collection.json`** - Mock data for individual plans collection 11. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/test/mocks/sites/fragments/fragment-individual-plans-wide-reflow.json`** - Mock data for individual plans with wide layout ### Test HTML Pages 12. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/test/merch-card.plans.test.html`** - Test page for Plans variant (lines 25-73 show Photoshop plan card) - Contains template with Photoshop icon, pricing, and "Buy now" CTA - Shows plans variant structure with checkout-link element 13. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/test/merch-card.ah-promoted-plans.test.html`** - Test page for promoted plans variant ### Nala Test Pages (Page Object Models) 14. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/nala/docs/acom/plans.page.js`** - Page object model for plans documentation tests - Selectors for plans card elements including CTAs 15. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/nala/studio/acom/plans/plans.page.js`** - Page object model for plans studio tests - Includes `cardCTA` locator (line 18): `page.locator('div[slot="footer"] > a[is="checkout-link"]')` - Maps all plan card elements including CTA buttons ### Promoted Plans Studio Pages 16. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/nala/studio/ahome/promoted-plans/promoted-plans.page.js`** - Page object model for promoted plans ### Test Specs & Tests 17. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/nala/docs/acom/plansdocs.spec.js`** - Playwright spec for plans documentation testing 18. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/nala/docs/acom/plansdocs.test.js`** - Playwright tests for plans documentation 19. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/test/hydrate.test.js`** - Unit tests for hydrate functions including CTA processing - Tests for `processCTAs()` function ### Documentation 20. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/docs/src/plans.md`** - Plans gallery documentation with links to test pages and Studio fragments 21. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/docs/plans.html`** - Compiled HTML documentation for plans ### Asset Files 22. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/web-components/test/mocks/img/photoshop.svg`** - Photoshop product icon/mnemonic SVG file 23. **`/Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/ac449148/studio/test/mocks/img/photoshop.svg`** - Studio test version of Photoshop icon ### Key CTA Elements Found The CTAs in the Photoshop Plans context follow this pattern: - **Element Type**: `` elements - **CTA Text**: "Buy now" (primary action) - **Data Attributes**: - `data-checkout-workflow` or `data-checkout-workflow-step` - `data-wcs-osi` (WCS offer ID) - `data-template` (typically "checkoutUrl") - `data-analytics-id` (tracking) - **Slot**: `footer` slot in merch-card component - **Processing**: CTAs are transformed from links to buttons via `transformLinkToButton()` in hydrate.js
